query:
-- AJo @ CO_vs_UTG 25bb
SELECT 
  rc.stackDepth, rc.spotKey, rc.title, rc.sourceStatus, rc.cellMapSource, rc.reviewStatus,
  rca.handCode, rca.primaryAction as action
FROM rangeCharts rc
JOIN rangeChartActions rca ON rca.chartId = rc.id
WHERE rc.spotKey = 'CO_vs_UTG' AND rc.stackDepth = 25 AND rca.handCode = 'AJo';

-- T3s @ BTN_vs_MP 25bb
SELECT 
  rc.stackDepth, rc.spotKey, rc.title, rc.sourceStatus, rc.cellMapSource, rc.reviewStatus,
  rca.handCode, rca.primaryAction as action
FROM rangeCharts rc
JOIN rangeChartActions rca ON rca.chartId = rc.id
WHERE rc.spotKey = 'BTN_vs_MP' AND rc.stackDepth = 25 AND rca.handCode = 'T3s';

-- K2s, Q2s, J2s, T2s @ UTG_RFI 25bb
SELECT 
  rc.stackDepth, rc.spotKey, rc.title, rc.sourceStatus, rc.cellMapSource, rc.reviewStatus,
  rca.handCode, rca.primaryAction as action
FROM rangeCharts rc
JOIN rangeChartActions rca ON rca.chartId = rc.id
WHERE rc.spotKey = 'UTG_RFI' AND rc.stackDepth = 25 AND rca.handCode IN ('K2s', 'Q2s', 'J2s', 'T2s')
ORDER BY rca.handCode;

-- AJo across all 25bb VS_UTG_RFI spots
SELECT 
  rc.stackDepth, rc.spotKey, rc.title, rc.sourceStatus,
  rca.handCode, rca.primaryAction as action
FROM rangeCharts rc
JOIN rangeChartActions rca ON rca.chartId = rc.id
WHERE rc.stackDepth = 25 AND rc.spotGroup = 'VS_UTG_RFI' AND rca.handCode = 'AJo'
ORDER BY rc.spotKey;

  rc.stackDepth, rc.spotKey, rc.title, rc.sourceStatus,
  rca.handCode, rca.primaryAction as action
